tags.name: `mc-option`
tags.description:
Purpose: To represent an option item within a list dropdown or select menu.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to display a selectable item within a dropdown or select menu.
When not to use: When you need to display a non-selectable item or a different layout.
Works with components: mc-select, mc-multi-select, mc-typeahead, mc-typeahead-multi-select
Alternative component names: Option Item, Select Item, Dropdown Item

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where main label goes.

  * `sublabel` {} - The `sublabel` slot where the sublabel goes.

  * `icon` {} - The `icon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

  * `trailingicon` {} - The `trailingicon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

  * ``badge`` {} - Used if you want to attach badge to the mc-button.
